scripts.format: prettier --write package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs drizzle.config.ts .prettierrc.json docker-compose.yml "drizzle/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,md}" "tests/**/*.ts" ".github/**/*.yml"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs drizzle.config.ts .prettierrc.json docker-compose.yml "drizzle/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,md}" "tests/**/*.ts" ".github/**/*.yml"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck
scripts.test:all: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm test:integration && corepack pnpm test:security
scripts.db:ci: corepack pnpm db:reset:test && corepack pnpm db:migrate && corepack pnpm db:test && corepack pnpm db:check:migrations
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm quality && corepack pnpm test:all && corepack pnpm build
